title: Gannarian narco-spice
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Gannarian narco-spice''' was a valuable [[Spice/Legends|spice]] variety. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], two [[Kilogram/Legends|kilos]] of the substance were enough to make someone wealthy for the rest of their life. It went by the street name "sniff".

[[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] improvised being a [[Spice/Legends|drug]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] on [[Hockaleg]] and gave a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] searching the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] a bag of "sniff" (actually [[slime yeast]] from the ''Falcon''{{'s}} galley) to keep the ship from being searched while [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] infiltrated the [[Tarkin (superweapon)|''Tarkin'' superweapon]] orbiting overhead.

==Appearances==
